title: Exception to hearsay rule
doc_html:
Art. 325.  Exception to hearsay rule

The videotape authorized by this Chapter is hereby admissible in evidence as an exception to the hearsay rule.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
